parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
box "Upstream" #F0F8FF
participant Producer as UP << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant Adapter as UA << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
end box

participant Transport as UT << (S,#ADD8E6) >>

box "Gateway" #F0F8FF
participant Adapter as GA << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant Consumer as GC << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
box "JobExecution" #E0FFFF
participant GatewayJobHandler as GJH << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
end box
participant Gateway as G << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant Producer as GP << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant Adapter as GPA << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
end box

participant Transport as GT << (S,#ADD8E6) >>

box "Downstream" #F0F8FF
participant Adapter as DA << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
participant Consumer as DC << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
end box

box "JobExecution" #E0FFFF
participant DownstreamJobHandler as DJH << (C,#ADD8E6) >>
end box

participant "Lower Layer" as LL << (S,#ADD8E6) >>

activate UP
UP -> UA : publish(command)
activate UA
UA -> UT : publish(command)
UT -> GA : execute(command)
activate GA
GA -> GC : handler(command, done)
activate GC
GC -> GJH : subscribe("done")
activate GJH
GC -> GJH : emit("command",\nGatewayJobHandler)
GJH --> G : 
activate G
G -> GP : publish(command)
activate GP
GP -> GPA : publish(command)
activate GPA
GPA -> GT : publish(command)
GT -> DA : execute(command)
activate DA
DA -> DC : handler(command, done)
activate DC
DC -> DJH : subscribe("done")
activate DJH
DC -> DJH : emit("command",\nGatewayJobHandler)
DJH --> LL : 
activate LL
LL -> DJH : done()
deactivate LL
DJH --> DC : emit("done")
deactivate DJH
DC -> DA : done(response)
deactivate DC
DA -> GT : done(response)
deactivate DA
GT -> GPA : getDelay(command)
GPA <-> GT : 
GPA --> GP : emit("response", response)
GP -> GP : handler("response")
GP -> GP : onTimeOut(getDelay())
GP -> GPA : unsubscribe()
deactivate GPA
GP -> G : resolve(responses)
deactivate GP
G -> GJH : done()
deactivate G
GJH --> GC : emit("done")
deactivate GJH
GC -> GA : done(response)
deactivate GC
GA -> UT : done(response)
deactivate GA
UT -> UA : getDelay(command)
UA <-> UT : 
UA --> UP : emit("response", response)
UP -> UP : handler("response")
UA --> UP : emit("response", response)
UP -> UP : handler("response")
UP -> UP : onTimeOut(getDelay())
UP -> UA : unsubscribe()
deactivate UA
deactivate UP

@enduml
```
